_provenance.description: Per-lesson Google Drive filename + page-header text for the answer-key sample lessons. Grade/season claims that live in filenames and page headers (which lessons.content_text lacks) are source-doc claims the re-tag pipeline must honor (ruling §A20). header is null when the doc had no header part, an unfilled ESYNYC template header, or a blank header segment.
_provenance.excluded_note: The 3 answer-key-exclusions.json lessons (slated for corpus deletion) are intentionally absent.
_provenance.corpus_wide_capture: COMPLETE 2026-06-12 — full-corpus sweep (B3.5a): 9 chunked background agents over the 705 non-sample docs + the 88 synthetic lesson_* ids (Drive ids resolved via read-only PROD file_link query, map at .tmp/b35a-chunks/lesson-id-map.json), plus a filename-correction pass for 58 placeholder-name records. Session-7 answer-key entries kept verbatim on the 9 overlaps (all 9 headers byte-identical between the two sweeps — method cross-validated). Not covered: the 12 corpus-exclusions rows (5 swept anyway before exclusion) and 2 dead-link docs (Trail Mix Greater-Than 1P8rs1bUmdlj_lKDPQSnMr1QANW-KnTWAuEAc-UbEDVw, The Curious Garden 1jQ5XtGr20RfoIZU_Ikd-X2dBffAqGbbB2ZklIcT-yYY) whose Drive files 404 — they run with no surfaces (loader treats missing entries as warn-and-proceed).
